tools.name: Codex CLI
tools.install: Install Codex CLI from the official OpenAI distribution.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade Codex CLI with the package manager used to install it.

tools.name: Superpowers for Codex
tools.install: Install Superpowers for Codex from obra/superpowers.
tools.upgrade: Update the Codex Superpowers checkout or plugin installation.

tools.name: CodeGraph
tools.install: Install CodeGraph and expose the codegraph command on PATH.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade CodeGraph with its installation package manager.

tools.name: Tokscale
tools.install: Install Tokscale globally with npm install --global tokscale@latest and expose the tokscale command on PATH.
tools.upgrade: Upgrade Tokscale to the latest release with the package manager used to install it.
